MiXplorer.description: MiXplorer is a fast, smooth, and feature-rich file manager for Android. It supports dual-pane browsing, cloud storage (Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, FTP, SFTP, SMB), archives, media playback, and extensive customisation. Extended through a rich ecosystem of add-on plugins.

MiX_Archive.description: Archive plugin for MiXplorer. Adds full support for ZIP, RAR, RAR5, 7z, TAR, GZ, BZ2, XZ, and more — browse, extract, and create archives directly inside MiXplorer. Requires MiXplorer to be installed.

MiX_Codecs.description: Codec plugin for MiXplorer. Extends the built-in media player with additional audio and video decoding support, enabling playback of formats not natively supported by the system. Requires MiXplorer to be installed.

MiX_Encrypt.description: Encryption plugin for MiXplorer. Provides strong file encryption and decryption directly from within MiXplorer. Protect sensitive files with industry-standard cryptographic algorithms. Requires MiXplorer to be installed.

MiX_Image.description: Image viewer plugin for MiXplorer. Adds support for a wide range of image formats with smooth zoom, pan, and gallery navigation. Includes basic image editing capabilities. Requires MiXplorer to be installed.

MiX_PDF.description: PDF viewer plugin for MiXplorer. Render and navigate PDF documents directly inside MiXplorer without switching to a separate app. Supports text selection, zoom, and page navigation. Requires MiXplorer to be installed.

MiX_Tagger.description: Audio tag editor plugin for MiXplorer. Edit ID3v1/v2, Vorbis, APE, and other metadata tags for MP3, FLAC, OGG, M4A, and more directly within MiXplorer. Supports batch editing and artwork embedding. Requires MiXplorer to be installed.
